series_metadata.series_description: Records include National Pollutant Discharge Elimination System permit applications, draft permits, and associated documents effective for a maximum of 5 years, regulating discharges of pollutants into waters of the state in accordance with Federal and State rules.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep for six months after request for withdrawal of permit application or draft permit; or for six months after issuance or denial of the final NPDES permit, unless an appeal of the decision is pending. In which case, keep until after all appeals are complete then destroy. ; Electronic: Keep for six months after request for withdrawal of permit application or draft permit; or for six months after issuance or denial of the final NPDES permit, unless an appeal of the decision is pending. In which case, keep until after all appeals are complete then destroy., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
